From KP, With Love

A Letter For You

Dear Mastermind ✨,

Today is the day the universe decided to gift the world with you — and honestly, it was the best decision it ever made.

You are the kind of person who makes every ordinary moment feel extraordinary. Your kindness is the kind that heals without anyone realizing. Your love is the kind that stays — warm, steady, and real.

You're soft like the first light of morning, and strong like the storm no one sees coming. You're Harshvi — the Mastermind who somehow stole my heart so effortlessly.

Whether it's late nights, ethnic fits, concert memories, or just every little moment we've shared — each one is a treasure I'll keep forever.

You deserve every good thing this world has to offer. On your birthday, I just want you to know — I'm so lucky you exist. So incredibly, endlessly lucky.

Happy Birthday, my favourite person. May this year bring you all the joy you bring to everyone around you. ✨

With all the ⚡ in the world,
KP (Khush) 💛

Birthday Wishes

All For You, Mastermind

From KP to Harshvi — with every wish ⚡

01
✨
May you always sparkle the way you do — even on ordinary Tuesdays, even in your worst days. You're magic.
02
💖
May the love you give to everyone around you come back to you a thousand times over. You deserve it all.
03
🌸
May your kindness always be protected. May the world always be gentle with your gentle heart.
04
🧠
May the Mastermind keep winning — in life, in love, in everything she touches.
05
🫶
And most of all — may you know, every single day, how deeply loved and adored you are. By me. Always.
💕 Happy Birthday, Harshvi

Made with every bit of love by KP (Khush) ⚡
